extract: The Tanoby Ruins (Japanese: アスカナいせき Asukana Ruins) are a part of the explorable area of the seventh of the nine Sevii Islands. The area is essentially useless before completion of the Tanoby Key, but after this puzzle is finished, the Tanoby Chambers become filled with Unown. According to a Ruin Maniac, the Ruins have been around for over 1,500 years for reasons unknown.
